mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_notification( user_id, actor_user_id, notification_type, title, content, target_type, target_id, target_url, is_read, created_at ) VALUES( #{userId}, #{actorUserId}, #{notificationType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetUrl}, #{isRead}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT n.*, actor.nickname AS actor_nickname, actor.avatar_path AS actor_avatar FROM forum_notification n LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile actor ON actor.user_id = n.actor_user_id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT n.*, actor.nickname AS actor_nickname, actor.avatar AS actor_avatar FROM forum_notification n LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile actor ON actor.user_id = n.actor_user_id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
